name: Carrot Cake
description: Spiced carrot cake ice cream with cream cheese frosting swirls. Tastes just like the classic dessert!

name: Irish Cream
description: Your favourite Irish cream liqueur in frozen form. It's creamy, slightly boozy, with a hint of chocolate and coffee.

name: Oatmeal Brown Sugar
description: Cinnamon-spiced oatmeal ice cream with ribbons of brown sugar caramel. Like a warm bowl of oatmeal cookie dough.

name: Strawberry
description: Fresh, fruity strawberry ice cream made with real berries. A taste of summer in every scoop.

name: Vegan Chocolate
description: Rich, decadent chocolate ice cream made without dairy. Creamy, smooth, and intensely chocolatey.

name: Vegan Peaches & Cream
description: Fresh peach swirls in our plant-based cream base. A North Van exclusive that captures the essence of summer.

name: Chocolate
description: Smooth, creamy, and oh-so-chocolatey! This ice cream is a lovely balance between our Milk Chocolate and Serious Chocolate flavours, and is sure to satisfy any chocolate-lover.

name: Cinnamon Bun
description: Get ready for a delightful treat with our cinnamon bun ice cream. We've taken freshly baked cinnamon buns, crafted in-house, and blended them into our creamy ice cream base, creating a delightful light bread texture that melts in your mouth.

name: Cookies + Cream
description: Classic vanilla ice cream loaded with chunks of chocolate sandwich cookies. A timeless favorite for all ages.

name: Cream Cheese
description: Tangy, rich cream cheese ice cream that tastes like cheesecake in frozen form. Surprisingly addictive!

name: Lemon Poppy Seed
description: Delicious Lemon Poppy Seed ice cream from Earnest Ice Cream.

name: London Fog
description: Earl Grey tea infused ice cream with vanilla. Inspired by the classic Vancouver coffee shop drink, this flavour combines bergamot-scented tea with creamy vanilla for a sophisticated treat.

name: Matcha Green Tea
description: Our matcha green tea powder is supplied by Aiya and grown in Nishio, a historic tea cultivation region in Japan, from a family owned and operated farm for the last 125 years. It's a shade-grown matcha, giving it light colour and caramel notes.

name: Mint Chip
description: Fresh mint ice cream studded with dark chocolate chips. Cool, refreshing, and perfectly balanced.

name: Salted Caramel
description: A classic for good reason. We've been making this one since day one and it remains a favourite still. Deeply caramelized sugar mixed with cream and salt from Vancouver Island Sea Salt Co. Its rich, creamy and buttery and the perfect balance of salty and sweet.

name: Tahitian Vanilla
description: Made with premium Tahitian vanilla beans known for their floral, fruity notes. Simple, elegant, and absolutely delicious.

name: Vegan Cookies + Cream
description: Plant-based cookies and cream made with our vegan vanilla base and chocolate sandwich cookies.

name: Vegan Nanaimo Bar
description: Inspired by the classic BC treat, this vegan flavour captures the essence of chocolate, coconut, and custard in every bite.

name: Vegan Strawberry Rhubarb Ripple
description: Fresh, fruity strawberry ice cream made with real berries. A taste of summer in every scoop.

name: Whiskey Hazelnut
description: An Earnest Ice Cream original, made from day one and remains a favourite and top-seller. Roasted, salted BC hazelnuts in Whiskey ice cream base. A smooth, boozy flavour with a buttery crunch.

name: Classic Sammie
description: A classic ice cream sandwich with vanilla ice cream between two chocolate cookies.

name: Mint Cookie Crunch Sammie
description: Mint ice cream with cookie crunch pieces sandwiched between chocolate cookies.

name: Vegan Chocolate Orange Sammie
description: Smooth, creamy, and oh-so-chocolatey! This ice cream is a lovely balance between our Milk Chocolate and Serious Chocolate flavours, and is sure to satisfy any chocolate-lover.

name: Vegan Mocha Brownie Sammie
description: Vegan mocha ice cream sandwiched between two fudgy brownie cookies.

name: Vegan Strawberry Chocolate Sprinkle Sammie
description: Smooth, creamy, and oh-so-chocolatey! This ice cream is a lovely balance between our Milk Chocolate and Serious Chocolate flavours, and is sure to satisfy any chocolate-lover.
